source_jobs.title: ML Application Engineer (Japanese or Korean-speaking)
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

The mission of Neural Concept’s ML Application Engineering team is to help our customers in Korea and solve their most complex engineering challenges. We collaborate closely with engineering and design teams within the automotive, aerospace and energy industries, understand their challenges and pains, and help them identify solutions to accelerate their conception processes. We leverage our platform to unlock the value of the most complex computer-aided engineering datasets and to create a direct impact on product design processes. Using 3D deep learning and engineering intelligence, we empower our customers to develop better products faster.



As a key player in the Application Engineering Team, your mission will be to help industry leaders to redefine their product design workflow with cutting-edge technologies. Your expertise should establish trust and admiration from our customers by delivering high-quality technical work. This is a chance to be at the intersection of engineering and AI, working with top-tier customers worldwide while shaping how the industry evolves. If you are interested in feeling firsthand the fast progress of engineering, this is the team for you.



What you will do

 - You will run projects together with our customer’s engineering teams, analyze and process engineering data using our platform and python libraries, and develop tailored solutions and workflows

 - You will apply our machine- and deep-learning workflows to different engineering/physics problems, as well as deliver proofs-of-concept demonstrating how our technology creates value in CAD, CAE, and manufacturing.

 - You will train customer teams to effectively use our methods and platform, ensuring smooth AI adoption into their workflows.

 - You will work closely with our developers to translate customer needs and feedback into product improvements.



Who you are

 - You are eager to tackle real-world challenges through machine learning and automation, with a passion for reshaping how engineering is practiced by industry leaders

 - You hold a Master’s or PhD degree in Engineering, Applied Mathematics, or Physics

 - You have an excellent understanding of both Engineering and Machine Learning (strict requirement)

 - You have strong experience with Python programming, and experience with machine learning and deep learning frameworks and libraries (strict requirement)

 - You have experience with simulation. Industry experience in CAD / CAE (CFD, FEM, etc) modelling is a plus

 - You can convey technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders in a clear and compelling way

 - You have excellent communication skills, enjoy working with people, and feel comfortable in the customer-facing role

 - You are fluent in English and Korean or Japanese (preferably native)- mandatory requirement.



What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.



What You Will Be

Location : Lausanne (Switzerland), UK, India, USA

Eligibility: we do provide Swiss visa sponsorship for a successful candidate

Travelling: Regular travels to South Korea and/ or Japan


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Senior Automotive Vehicle Solution Owner
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Neural Concept’s Vertical Solutions team turns the most critical engineering use cases into streamlined, production-grade workflows empowered by leading AI technologies.

As Senior Vehicle Solution Owner, you will use a decade of automotive engineering experience to lead one of the most strategically important parts of our automotive offering. You will define the Vehicle Body solution — built on top of the Neural Concept platform — combining design, simulation and data-science/ML to compress development cycles across the full breadth of vehicle attributes. You will partner directly with leading OEMs to understand their needs and translate them into solution direction and product strategy.

If you have spent your career as a chief engineer, attribute lead or technical specialist designing cars, this is a unique chance to step out of a single program and shape, at industry scale, how vehicle are engineered with AI.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own the Vehicle solution end to end. Define and deliver competitive, replicable solutions for automotive vehicle engineering on the Neural Concept platform, spanning the full breadth of body attributes.

 - Partner with lead customers. Lead discovery interviews with OEM and Tier-1 customers, build trusted strategic relationships, validate solutions against real-world requirements, and expand product scope to cover a larger part of the design process.

 - Work hands-on with ML engineers and scientists. Collaborate closely with a cross-functional team of CAD/CAE/ML engineers — from prototype to production-ready solution — to advance what is possible in engineering design with AI.

 - Enable go-to-market teams. Equip Sales, Solution Engineering, and Marketing with the domain knowledge, value proposition, and materials they need to position the Vehicle solution credibly with senior automotive stakeholders.

 - Support strategic customers and partners. Represent Neural Concept in high-level technical and strategic discussions, monitor key customer projects within the vertical to ensure alignment and value delivery, and align vertical initiatives with overall company strategy.




WHO YOU ARE





EXPERIENCE

 - 10+ years in the automotive industry designing vehicles, in a role such as chief engineer, attribute lead, or technical lead focused on key performance attributes (e.g. aerodynamics, crash/structural safety, thermal).

 - Proven track record of owning vehicle engineering decisions across the full development cycle: requirements, concept, modeling and simulation, validation, testing, and release.

 - Experience building and influencing relationships with senior engineering stakeholders at OEMs.


HARD SKILLS

 - Hands-on understanding of CAD, PLM, simulation (CAE), physical and virtual testing, and design for manufacturing.

 - Fluent in the workflows and tools automotive body engineers use — for example CATIA / NX and Teamcenter / 3DEXPERIENCE (CAD/PLM); LS-DYNA, Pam-Crash, Radioss, Abaqus, Nastran (crash/structural); StarCCM+, OpenFOAM, PowerFLOW (aero/thermal).

 - Comfortable working with data-driven engineering approaches.


MINDSET

 - Pragmatic problem solver — focused on impact, not buzzwords; willing to look at engineering from a new angle and challenge established ways of working.

 - Strong customer discovery skills and empathy, with the credibility to engage senior automotive leaders.

 - Strategic thinker who can move fluidly between long-term direction and hands-on, cross-functional delivery.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Hands-on experience with Python, AI tools, and ML/data-science processes.

 - Exposure to applying machine learning or surrogate modeling to engineering design.

Tags: #Automotive #VehicleBody #Aerodynamics #Crash #Thermal #CAD #CAE #PLM #DFM #SimulationAI #DeepLearning




WHAT YOU GET

 - Work with a world-class technology team — our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportuniti

source_jobs.title: EV Powertrain Solution Owner
source_jobs.description:
About the role

Neural Concept’s Vertical Solutions team turns the most common engineering use cases into streamlined, production-grade workflows empowered by leading AI technologies.

As EV Powertrain Solution Owner, you will use your engineering background to define and lead the development of industry-specific workflows combining design, simulation, and data-science/ML to shorten product development cycles and enable customers to realize value quickly and at scale. You will partner with industry leader customers to understand sector needs and define relevant solutions, aligned with real-world requirements.

In this pivotal role, you will work across team borders to make sure our product, team members and clients can leverage and benefit from what you will build.

What you will do

 - Define and deliver competitive, replicable solutions tailored to your industry's specific application.

 - Deeply understand customer needs and articulate a strong value proposition in this context.

 - Monitor customer projects within your vertical application to ensure mutual alignment and value delivery.

 - Lead discovery interviews with customers, validate solutions, and expand product scope to cover a bigger part of the design process.

 - Lead and participate hands-on in a small cross-functional team of CAD/CAE/ML engineers from prototype to production-ready solutions.

 - Align vertical initiatives with company strategy, while bringing back industry insights to shape the global roadmap.

Who you are

 - 5+ years in engineering or product management in Electric vehicle powertrain development.

 - Hands-on prototyping with CAD / CAE / ML / Python scripting to de-risk ideas quickly.

 - Exposure to end-to-end engineering design process: requirements, concept, modelling and simulation, validation, and release.

 - Exposure to data-driven engineering.

 - Industry experience in systems design. Fluent in the workflows and tools engineers use for CAD, CAE, PLM (e.g. ANSA, OpenFoam, STAR-CCM+, Abaqus, Ansys Mechanical / Fluent / Icepak, JMAG, etc.)

 - Pragmatic approach to problem solving: focus on impact, not buzzwords. Willing to think out of the box, look at engineering from a whole new angle and break the rules.

 - Customer discovery skills and empathy.

What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model (40% remote) and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Senior Technical Account Manager (Korean- speaking)
source_jobs.description:
About Neural Concept

Neural Concept is a rapidly growing company at the forefront of revolutionizing product design and simulation through advanced data science and machine learning. Specializing in optimizing engineering processes for industries such as automotive, aerospace, and energy, Neural Concept combines AI, machine learning, generative design, and engineering know-how to help world-class engineers develop products faster, more efficiently, and with improved performance.



Since its founding in 2018 in Switzerland, the company has doubled its growth year over year, transitioning from a startup to a scale-up with a global team of 100+ people. Neural Concept has already made significant strides in its market, establishing a strong presence in Europe, the US, Japan and Korea.

Neural Concept has a new office in Korea, where we already have valued customers and see tremendous growth potential. Join us at the cutting edge of innovation and help shape our future success in Korea’s dynamic market. If you’re ready to grow your career in a thriving tech hub, we’d love to have you on our team.



About the Role

We’re looking for a professional who combines technical expertise with a talent for building customer relationships in a dynamic, commercial role. This position uniquely combines engineering expertise with business acumen in the exciting field of AI for Engineering. In addition to our Account Managers and Partners, who are responsible for bringing in new customers and projects, it will be your responsibility to handle a portfolio of existing customers as main contact and helping to grow their usage of Neural Concept. Join us in making a profound impact by guiding customers toward transformative business success, working with leading engineering companies in Korea.



What you will do

 - Drive adoption and success: Create data-driven success plans, monitor usage and engagement metrics, and partner with Account Managers on expansion and renewal strategies for key accounts.

 - Enable expert users: Deliver tailored demos, structured onboarding, and workflow deep-dives for designers and simulation engineers, then reinforce learning through hands-on workshops and bootcamps.

 - Scope and run projects: Lead discovery, craft solution-oriented technical proposals, and own milestone tracking, status reporting, and risk management from kick-off to delivery.

 - Amplify the customer voice: Capture feature requests and usability feedback, maintain a tight feedback loop with Product and R&D, and advocate for enhancements that reflect industry trends.

 - Report impact: Track and share KPIs such as customer health scores, retention, and adoption milestones to ensure transparency and continuous improvement.

 - Cross-functional collaboration: Act as a trusted advisor who bridges Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Product, aligning internal roadmaps with customer objectives and steering-committee priorities.



Who you are

 - You have an Engineering degree and industry experience in a customer facing
   role

 - You are experienced in Project and/or Account Management

 - You bring at least 6 years of proven experience in a technology-driven environment

 - You have business confidence, entrepreneurial spirit, and high energy

 - You are familiar with CAD/CAE software

 - You understand Machine Learning methods and are interested in AI's impact in Engineering

 - You are committed to a high level of professionalism and ethics

 - Fluent in English and Korean (strict requirement)
   
   

What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by hel

source_jobs.title: Consumer Electronics Solution Owner
source_jobs.description:
About the role

Neural Concept’s Vertical Solutions team turns the most common engineering use cases into streamlined, production-grade workflows empowered by leading AI technologies.



As Consumer Electronics Solution Owner, you will use your engineering background to define and lead the development of industry-specific workflows combining design, simulation, and data-science/ML to shorten product development cycles and enable customers to realize value quickly and at scale. You will partner with industry leader customers to understand sector needs and define relevant solutions, aligned with real-world requirements.

In this pivotal role, you will work across team borders to make sure our product, team-members and clients can leverage and benefit from what you will build.



What you will do

 - Define and deliver competitive and replicable solutions tailored to the consumer electronics industry.

 - Deeply understand customer needs and articulate a strong value proposition in this context.

 - Monitor customer projects within your vertical application to ensure mutual alignment and value delivery.

 - Lead discovery interviews with customers, validate solutions, and expand product scope to cover a bigger part of the design process.

 - Lead and participate hands-on into a small cross-functional team of CAD/CAE/ML engineers from prototype to production-ready solutions.

 - Align vertical initiatives with company strategy, while bringing back industry insights to shape the global roadmap.



Who you are

 - 5+ years in engineering

 - Industry experience in design, simulation, and validation of electronic devices and components, with a strong understanding of mechanical and thermal reliability challenges in compact electronic systems — including drop and impact performance, thermal management of chips and batteries, vibration, and environmental durability

 - Strong understanding of the engineering workflows, tools, and data used across CAD, CAE, and PLM environments related to consumer electronics design (e.g., SolidWorks, NX, ANSYS Mechanical, Simcenter Flotherm, Icepak, Abaqus, and Teamcenter etc...), covering domains such as drop and vibration analysis, thermal management, structural integrity, fatigue analysis, and environmental durability.

 - Hands-on prototyping with CAD / CAE / ML scripting to de-risk ideas quickly. Python proficiency is a requirement.

 - Exposure to end-to-end engineering design processes: requirements, concept, modeling and simulation, validation, release.

 - Exposure to data-driven engineering.

 - Pragmatic approach to problem solving: focus on impact, not buzzwords. Willing to think out of the box, look at engineering from a whole new angle and break the rules.

 - Customer discovery skills and empathy.



What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model (40% remote) and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.
   
   


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

Where You Will Be

source_jobs.title: VP of Engineering
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

As VP of Engineering, you will be responsible for building, scaling, and operating a high-performing software engineering organization capable of reliably delivering Neural Concept’s ambitious product and technology roadmap.

You will turn product vision into software reality, while ensuring our teams and culture scale sustainably — in quality, velocity, and people development.



What you will do

Own engineering execution and delivery

 - Ensure predictable, high-quality delivery across product and platform initiatives

 - Translate product and technical strategy into realistic plans, milestones, and commitments

 - Identify risks early and manage trade-offs transparently

Structure the engineering organization

 - Evolve team structures, ownership boundaries, and collaboration models as we scale

 - Build and coach engineering managers and tech leads

 - Continuously adapt the organization to match company growth

Build strong and modern engineering processes

 - Establish lightweight, effective development processes that scale without bureaucracy

 - Leverage the best of AI technologies to amplify our impact while maintaining small, agile teams

 - Define and track the right engineering metrics

Guarantee technical quality, reliability, and security in practice

 - Partner with the CTO to uphold architectural principles and long-term technical health

 - Drive pragmatic approaches to technical debt, qulity testing, and operational excellence

 - Collaborate with GTM and deployment teams to guarantee smooth, secure deployments across diverse customer scaling scenarios

Collaborate closely with leadership and customers

 - Work together with Product, Research, Deployment, and Leadership

 - Represent engineering in cross-functional and customer-facing discussions

 - Act as a key partner to the CTO, providing clear signals on execution, risk, and org health



Who you are

You are a senior engineering leader who combines strong technical judgment with operational excellence and a deep understanding of how organizations scale. You are product-minded, pragmatic, think in systems and understand how outcomes derive from how people work together.



Proven experience leading software engineering organizations at scale

 - Experience scaling teams, at least x2 and 50+ engineers

 - Experience managing managers and tech leads

 - A track record of managing delivery in fast-growing, low-process environments

Strong technical credibility

 - Broad understanding of modern software architecture, infrastructure, and security

 - Deep understanding about modern AI technology for software engineering

 - Ability to engage deeply with engineers on design, trade-offs, and reliability

 - Comfort operating in AI- and data-intensive product environments

Product mindset and pragmatism

 - Ability to balance speed, quality, and long-term sustainability

 - User-first and product minded

 - Calm decision-making under pressure

 - Outcomes-focused, and not perfectionist

A people-first leadership mindset

 - High empathy and strong communication skills

 - Commitment to growing others and building healthy teams

Drive and ownership

 - Willingness to take responsibility and make hard calls

 - Track record of inspiring others and building confidence in high-uncertainty environments



What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid sched

source_jobs.title: Regional Sales Director (Japan)
source_jobs.description:
About Us

Neural Concept is a rapidly growing company at the forefront of revolutionizing product design and simulation through advanced data science and machine learning. Specializing in optimizing engineering processes for industries such as automotive, aerospace, and energy, Neural Concept combines AI, machine learning, and generative design to help engineers develop products faster, more efficiently, and with improved performance.

Since its founding in 2018 in Switzerland, the company has doubled its growth year over year, transitioning from a startup to a scale-up with a team of 100+ people. Neural Concept has already made significant strides in its market, establishing a strong presence in Europe, the US, and Asia.



What you will do

In this high-impact role, you will combine technical expertise and sales leadership to drive revenue growth, build strategic partnerships, and represent our technology to the leading engineering companies in Japan. We are seeking a seasoned sales leader with a solid engineering foundation who will identify, develop, and execute strategies to capture new business opportunities in Japan while strengthening relationships with existing customers.



Who you are

 - 10+ years of experience in highly technical enterprise SaaS sales with 9-12 month sales cycles

 - Experience closing deals in the $100,000 to $ 1 M+ USD range equivalent

 - Experience selling data science/engineering teams, IT & cloud infrastructure teams

 - Experience selling into the Industrial & Manufacturing industry is a plus

 - Mandatory engineering background with exposure to CAD/CAE software or related engineering tools is a plus.

 - You exhibit professionalism, ethical conduct, and excellent interpersonal communication skills.

 - You have a genuine passion for continuous learning and innovation.

 - Fluent in English and native Japanese
   
   

What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model (30% remote) and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.

 - Enjoy 20 days of paid vacations per year, healthcare, and other benefits



Where You Will Be

 - Tokyo, with flexibility for remote work

 - Start date: ASAP

 - Eligibility: Japanese citizen


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer (German-speaking)
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

The mission of Neural Concept's Application Engineering team is to help industry leaders redefine how they design products — by bridging cutting-edge AI technology with real-world engineering challenges. We work hand-in-hand with engineering, design, and executive teams across automotive, aerospace, and energy to understand their strategic needs and deliver solutions that create measurable impact.


As part of this team, you will sit at the intersection of business and technology — translating complex customer challenges into high-value AI-powered solutions, and ensuring those solutions actually land and stick within our customers' organizations. This is a role for someone who thrives equally in a boardroom conversation with a VP and in a deep-dive technical session with engineers.


If you're excited about shaping how industry leaders adopt AI and about being a trusted advisor to some of the world's most sophisticated engineering teams, this is the role for you.



What you will do

 - Understand and shape customer strategy: Engage with senior stakeholders (VP, C-level) to understand their business challenges, articulate the value of AI-assisted design, and co-design high-level solution roadmaps.

 - Design and deliver solutions: Translate business requirements into concrete technical approaches using NC's platform, working closely with customer engineering teams and internal developers.

 - Drive adoption: Guide customers through AI adoption — from proof-of-concept to full integration — ensuring teams are equipped and confident to use new workflows.

 - Be the bridge: Act as the link between customer needs and NC's product evolution, feeding insights back to our development team to continuously improve the platform.



Who you are

 - You are a strong communicator and trusted advisor — you can engage confidently with senior stakeholders (VP, C-level), build relationships quickly, and drive alignment around complex, ambiguous problems

 - You have experience designing solutions end-to-end: from understanding a business need to translating it into a concrete technical approach

 - You are comfortable working in a customer-facing environment, navigating both executive conversations and deep technical sessions with engineering teams

 - You hold a Master's or PhD degree in Engineering, Applied Mathematics, Physics, or a related field — or have equivalent experience in an industrial or consultancy setting

 - You have a solid understanding of engineering simulation concepts (CAD/CAE, CFD, FEM, or similar) — whether from an academic or industry background

 - You have working knowledge of machine learning and how it applies to engineering problems; hands-on experience with Python and ML/deep learning frameworks is a strong plus

 - You are intellectually curious and eager to tackle real-world engineering challenges through AI and automation

 - You are fluent in English and German (preferably native)



We value different balances of business and technical skills. Whether your strength is in solution design and stakeholder management, or in hands-on implementation, we want to hear from you.



What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.




WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Solutions Engineer
Application Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

The mission of Neural Concept’s Application Engineering team is to help our customers solve their most complex engineering challenges. We collaborate closely with engineering and design teams within the automotive, aerospace and energy industries, understand their challenges and pains, and help them identify solutions to accelerate their conception processes. We leverage our platform to unlock the value of the most complex computer-aided engineering datasets and to create a direct impact on product design processes. Using 3D deep learning and engineering intelligence, we empower our customers to develop better products faster.



As a key player in the Application Engineering Team, your mission will be to help industry leaders to redefine their product design workflow with cutting-edge technologies. Your expertise should establish trust and admiration from our customers by delivering high-quality technical work. This is a chance to be at the intersection of engineering and AI, working with top-tier customers worldwide while shaping how the industry evolves. If you are interested in feeling firsthand the fast progress of engineering, this is the team for you.



What you will do

 - You will run projects together with our customer’s engineering teams, analyze and process engineering data using our platform and python libraries, and develop tailored solutions and workflows

 - You will apply our machine- and deep-learning workflows to different engineering/physics problems, as well as deliver proofs-of-concept demonstrating how our technology creates value in CAD, CAE, and manufacturing.

 - You will train customer teams to effectively use our methods and platform, ensuring smooth AI adoption into their workflows.

 - You will work closely with our developers to translate customer needs and feedback into product improvements.



Who you are

 - You are eager to tackle real-world challenges through machine learning and automation, with a passion for reshaping how engineering is practiced by industry leaders

 - You hold a Master’s or PhD degree in Engineering, Applied Mathematics, or Physics

 - You have an excellent understanding of both Engineering and Machine Learning (strict requirement)

 - You have strong experience with Python programming, and experience with machine learning and deep learning frameworks and libraries (strict requirement)

 - You have experience with simulation. Industry experience in CAD / CAE (CFD, FEM, etc) modelling is a plus

 - You can convey technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders in a clear and compelling way

 - You have excellent communication skills, enjoy working with people, and feel comfortable in the customer-facing role

 - You are fluent in English (mandatory)
   
   

What You Get

 - Work with a world-class technology team – our engineers are top-notch, and we always aim for excellence.

 - Benefit from a competitive salary and rewarding opportunities as we continue to scale.

 - Thrive in a collaborative, multicultural environment where your work is visible and recognized.

 - Develop professionally alongside talented colleagues who share knowledge freely and support one another.

 - Make a global impact by helping customers shift to AI-assisted design, making innovation faster, smarter, and more sustainable.

 - Balance life and work with a hybrid model and flexible hours—we care about results, not rigid schedules.




WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Technical Account Manager (India)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT NEURAL CONCEPT

Engineering is at an inflection point. The teams defining the next generation of aircraft, electric vehicles, and consumer products are not just designing faster — they are designing fundamentally differently, with AI embedded at the core of their workflows.

Neural Concept builds the Engineering AI platform that makes this possible. We help the world's leading engineering teams accelerate development, improve product outcomes, and scale engineering capacity — turning months of simulation into days, and engineering intuition into data-driven insight.

We work with elite engineering teams in Automotive, Consumer Tech, and advanced manufacturing, where the stakes are high, the complexity is rising, and the pressure to innovate has never been greater. We are changing how engineers work. Come build that future with us.

 


ABOUT THE ROLE

Engineering simulation is about to change fundamentally — and you will be the person who makes that change real for the world's leading product companies.

As a Technical Account Manager, you will be on the front lines of deploying AI-driven simulation into live CAE workflows: not as a demo, but as a tool that engineers reach for every day. Working closely with Sales, you will drive the acquisition of new customers and the expansion of existing accounts — acting as a trusted engineering advisor who bridges cutting-edge AI technology and the real-world demands of simulation engineers, design teams, and engineering leadership.

The foundation of this role is engineering credibility: you understand how CAE-driven design processes work, you speak the language of simulation engineers and designers, and you earn trust by understanding problems before proposing solutions.



You'll thrive in this role if you combine:

 - Ability to convince and inspire, backed by deep engineering expertise (CAD/CAE background)

 - A natural curiosity for problem discovery and technical exploration

 - Experience in engineering software sales or technical consulting

 - Structured execution and a commercial mindset

 
 


WHAT YOU'LL DO

Discover and scope high-value use cases

 - Lead structured discovery sessions with engineering and simulation teams to identify where Neural Concept can create the most impact

 - Define use cases with clear success criteria, scoping, and business justification

 - Navigate technical complexity and ambiguity to turn exploratory conversations into actionable programs



Drive customer adoption and expansion

 - Build success plans tied to measurable business outcomes (time-to-market, iteration reduction, engineering capacity, quality)

 - Plan and execute software demos, prepare tailored presentations

 - Monitor usage and engagement, identify risks early, and lead expansion motions alongside Account Executives



Enable engineering teams in real workflows

 - Facilitate structured onboarding, technical deep-dives, and hands-on workshops to drive adoption and utilisation

 - Translate Neural Concept capabilities into the customer's actual design and simulation workflows



Lead technical project execution

 - Coordinate with Application Engineers and R&D when deep technical delivery is required



Be the voice of the customer

 - Capture product feedback, usability issues, and feature requests

 - Maintain a tight feedback loop with Product and R&D to influence roadmap priorities



Communicate impact with clarity

 - Report customer health, adoption milestones, and value realisation

 - Present outcomes to engineering leaders and steering committees

 


SUCCESS IN THIS ROLE LOOKS LIKE:

 - Customers adopt NC into daily engineering workflows

 - Engineering champions become internal advocates for Engineering AI transformation

 - Renewals and expansions are earned through value

 


WHO YOU ARE

 - You have an engineering degree (mechanical, aerospace, automotive, industrial, or similar) and hands-on experience with CAD/CAE tools and workflows

 - You have experie

source_jobs.title: Product Manager
source_jobs.description:
About the Role

Neural Concept is at the intersection of 3D deep learning and industrial engineering, building the tools that help the world's leading manufacturers design better products, faster. We're looking for a Product Manager who has lived the reality of engineering workflows inside large industrial organizations — and who is equally excited about where the industry is going. You understand what it feels like to wait on a simulation, to navigate a multi-year vehicle program, and to work within the constraints of a legacy toolchain. And you've seen — or been part of — what's possible when engineering meets modern AI and software. A formal "PM" title is not required; what matters is proven product thinking, sharp communication, and the humility to deeply understand problems that are different from your own experience. This is a rare role at the intersection of engineering credibility and product craft — and a unique opportunity to shape how AI transforms one of the most consequential domains in the world.



What you will do

 - Engage deeply with customers — OEM engineering teams, simulation specialists, and program managers — to understand their day-to-day workflows, frustrations, and unmet needs, bringing genuine curiosity and listening skills to every interaction.

 - Translate customer insight, market signals, and technical feasibility into clear product requirements and prioritized roadmap decisions, in close collaboration with Engineering and the leadership team.

 - Own the product discovery process: design and run user research, synthesize findings across customer segments, and develop hypotheses that the team can build, test, and iterate on.

 - Collaborate cross-functionally with Sales, Application Engineering, and Marketing to ensure product decisions are grounded in real customer value and commercial viability.

 - Represent the voice of industrial engineers internally — keeping the product technically credible, practically useful, and commercially sharp.

 - Track trends in engineering software, advanced simulation, and AI tooling to identify whitespace, emerging use cases, and competitive positioning opportunities.



Who you are

 - You have 3+ years of real engineering experience inside a large industrial organization — you know what it feels like to work on multi-year programs, navigate complex systems, and live with the constraints of real-world manufacturing or product development.

 - You've also been exposed to a more modern environment — whether at a fast-moving hardware company, a next-gen engineering software startup, or a tech company embedded in industrial accounts — and you're energized by what AI and software can unlock for engineering teams.

 - You bring genuine product instincts: you listen more than you talk, you're curious about problems that are different from your own engineering experience, and you know how to bring people along without having formal authority.

 - You communicate with precision — in writing and in conversation — and you make prioritization decisions with structure and clear reasoning.

 - You hold a degree in engineering or a related technical discipline; an advanced degree (MSc, PhD) is a plus.

 - You are fluent in English; additional European languages are a plus.



We know this combination of skills is rare. If you have one deep engineering experience — whether at a legacy industrial company or a modern company like Tesla or SpaceX — and strong product instincts, we want to hear from you.


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Product Quality Engineer & Test Automation
source_jobs.description:
The User Empowerment Squad

Our User Empowerment squad ensures that every user can fully and quickly unlock the value of our platform. We work at the intersection of product and community, on a mission to bridge knowledge between users and product: we create inspiring learning resources, design smooth onboarding journeys, oversee high-quality technical documentation, validate product quality and best communicate feature value. By combining technical rigor with user-centric storytelling, we empower our community to adopt, master, and advocate for our technology.



About the role

Building an enterprise-grade product demands extreme discipline and robustness in the validation phase prior to release to offer exceptional experience to our users. This role is about expanding the quality practice and ensuring reliability grows alongside development velocity.



What you will do

 - Build and own the test automation of the platform enabling continuous quality assurance. Leverage AI agents and latest technologies for optimal test automation.

 - Own the responsibility for the team to achieve its quality targets:
   
   - 80% quality issues caught directly during the development cycle by automated tests. Manual tests are only focused on the 20% edge cases.
   
   - 90% customer facing releases and patches are shipped without any quality delays.

 - Establish and maintain prioritized QA roadmap aligned with VP Engineering objectives, ensuring QA team focuses on highest-risk areas, with clear ownership.

 - Implement standardized and shared quality playbook adopted across 100% of product areas, documenting defined risk categories, acceptance criteria, and test requirements for each domain.

 - Reduce average bug resolution time by 30% through joint triage, severity evaluation and validation processes.



Who you are

You are a guardian of reliability, deeply enthusiastic about providing trust in a product that evolves fast. You are intrinsically leveraging the best tools to multiply your impact and have actionable bug reports.



In particular, you bring:

 - Strong QA experience (6 year +) in complex technical software (CAE, CAD, PLM, simulation, or similarly demanding systems)

 - Applied depth in AI and agentic tools for QA and test automation, with curiosity for innovation and the ability to use it thoughtfully for meaningful impact.

 - Field knowledge in Mechanical Engineering, Physics and Machine Learning

 - Solid technical foundations (automation, CI/CD, python scripting, Playwright automations, software performance testing)

 - Reasoning deeply about product behavior to influence QA decisions

 - Seamless collaboration with developers and leadership, communicating clearly, pragmatically, and with impact.

 - Ownership of problems end-to-end and taking responsibility for the quality of what users ultimately experience.

 - A strong team spirit and builder mindset, ready to understand what our users need, deliver under uncertainty and push the boundaries of what’s possible.


WE'RE PROUD TO BE AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER, AND WE'RE COMMITTED TO BUILDING A DIVERSE AND INCLUSIVE ENVIRONMENT WHERE YOU CAN THRIVE.

source_jobs.title: Field Marketing Manager APAC
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for an experienced Field Marketing Manager to own and scale Neural Concept's field marketing motion across Korea and Japan, in close partnership with Sales.

Neural Concept is a category-defining Engineering Intelligence company, helping the world's leading engineering teams design better products faster using AI purpose-built for engineering.

We recently opened our Seoul office - but we're not starting from scratch. Neural Concept already has an established presence across Korea and Japan, working with some of the region's most demanding engineering organisations. We are now building the marketing and commercial infrastructure to match the ambition of the opportunity.

As the first dedicated marketing hire for the region, this is an opportunity to build the marketing motion across two markets - establishing the playbook, growing the pipeline, and amplifying Neural Concept's brand across Korea and Japan. Based in Seoul, Korea will be your primary focus, with Japan as an active and natural extension of your remit.

A distinctive aspect of this role: you will work alongside senior industry advisors with deep executive networks in Korean industry. This gives you an exceptional platform to engage with the highest levels of Korean industrial leadership from day one.

You will design and execute field programs that accelerate enterprise pipeline, support complex sales cycles, and strengthen Neural Concept's positioning with engineering leaders and executives across Korea and Japan.





WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Design and execute the Korea and Japan field marketing strategy aligned with global marketing priorities and Korea sales objectives.

 - Partner closely with Sales to drive pipeline creation, deal acceleration, and account expansion for priority enterprise accounts.

 - Plan and deliver high-impact field programs, including:
   
   - Executive dinners and private roundtables
   
   - Flagship industry conferences and selective trade events
   
   - Account-based marketing (ABM) programs for top-tier accounts
   
   - Creative, targeted field activations designed to reach senior engineering and business leaders at Korea's leading conglomerates

 - Co-create and execute joint field programs with strategic technology partners (e.g., NVIDIA, Microsoft, AWS).

 - Leverage local networks and institutions to expand Neural Concept's visibility.

 - Own programs end-to-end: from concept and budgeting to execution, follow-up, and measurement.

 - Track and report performance using pipeline influenced, and revenue impact.

 - Act as the voice of the Korean market, sharing field insights, customer feedback, and competitive signals with the broader marketing and leadership teams.





WHO YOU ARE

Experience & Skills

 - 6-10 years of experience in B2B field marketing, revenue marketing, or demand generation in an enterprise or complex sales environment.

 - Proven track record of working tightly with Sales teams on pipeline-driven initiatives.

 - Hands-on experience designing and executing executive-level events, ABM programs, and field activations.

 - Strong understanding of the Korean industrial landscape - automotive, electronics, energy, heavy manufacturing - and how decisions are made in large Korean organisations.

 - Korean native or bilingual - ability to create content, build relationships, and operate credibly in the Korean market is essential. Japanese is a strong plus.

 - Ability to plan, execute, and measure programs independently, with high ownership.
   
   

Nice to Have

 - Experience in B2B SaaS, AI, engineering software, or deep-tech environments.

 - Experience working with global or distributed teams.

 - Prior exposure to partner or ecosystem marketing.

 - Existing network within Korean and/or Japanese engineering or industrial circles.



Mindset & Soft Skills

 - Highly autonomous and structured, with strong execution discipline.

 - Comfortable operating with ambiguity and evolving

source_jobs.title: Senior CAE Expert
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

Neural Concept accelerates the full engineering simulation cycle. Our AI platform compresses the time from design change to validated result, so engineering teams can explore more, iterate faster, and ship better products. The Vertical Solutions team turns that capability into production-grade, domain-specific solutions for our customers.

As a Senior CAE Expert, you will own the simulation workflows, benchmarks, and solution assets that sit at the heart of what we deliver. Your work will land directly inside the engineering processes of leading automotive OEMs and consumer electronics companies — accelerating the entire cycle from geometry change through to crash, safety, and drop test results.




WHAT YOU WILL DO

 - Own vertical solution assets end-to-end. Design and develop simulation workflows, validation benchmarks, and solution templates for automotive structural analysis (crash, occupant safety, pedestrian safety) and consumer electronics durability (drop test, vibration). Take assets from concept through to handover to Sales and Customer Success.

 - Accelerate the full simulation pipeline. Map the complete cycle — design change, automated meshing, solver configuration, job execution, and design optimisation — onto Neural Concept's platform. Define accuracy and speed requirements, validate against benchmark data, and deliver repeatable, production-grade workflows using tools such as ABAQUS, LS-Dyna, Radioss, Hypermesh, ANSA, and Simlab.

 - Write Python automation and tooling. Script data preprocessing, solution packaging, and workflow integration. Maintain solution reproducibility standards and contribute to internal tooling libraries.

 - Drive the product roadmap from the field. Partner with Product and Engineering to surface simulation-specific platform requirements, validate new capabilities, and feed real-world use cases directly into development priorities.




WHO YOU ARE

 - 5–8 years of hands-on FEA simulation experience, in the application of vehicle crash, drop test, pedestrian and/or passenger safety, delivering production-quality models in automotive or consumer electronics environments

 - Deep expertise in leading Mechanical pre-solve-post tools, such as: ABAQUS, LS-Dyna, Radioss, Hypermesh, Simlab, ANSA, Meta, d3plot

 - Strong command of structural non-linear simulation: implicit/explicit solvers, contact formulations, material models, failure criteria

 - Demonstrated experience in automotive safety simulations (crash, occupant safety, pedestrian safety) or product durability testing (drop test, shock, vibration)

 - Experience with end-to-end simulation workflows: CAD preparation → Meshing → Solving → Post-processing → Visualization

 - Scripting and programming: Python (preferred); C++, Java, or C# also valued. Exposure to open-source tools (e.g., OpenFOAM, FEniCSx) and pre/post tools (e.g., Gmsh, ParaView) a plus.

 - Able to own deliverables independently and communicate complex technical concepts clearly to non-specialist audiences

 - Proficiency in both written and spoken English, with the ability to articulate technical complexity with clarity.


NICE TO HAVE

 - Familiarity with AI-assisted simulation acceleration, design optimisation, or parametric study automation

 - Comfort with Git and modern dev environments/IDEs; basic CI for validation of templates and scripts

 - Master HPC and Cloud resources. Execute and refine complex simulations within high-performance computing environments, effectively deploying GPU acceleration to maximize workflow performance.




WHAT YOU GET

 - Competitive salary and benefits

 - Training budget — we believe continuous education is essential for you and for us.

 - Work directly with a world-class engineering team that sets high standards and means it.

 - Visible, high-impact work inside a collaborative, multicultural environment where your contributions are recognised.
